---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new skill, agent, or workflow improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve

Describe the problem you're hitting that this feature would address. Be specific — "I had to do X manually three times this week" is more useful than "it would be nice if".

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see added or changed. If you have a sketch (skill structure, agent prompt, hook config), paste it here.

## Alternatives considered

Have you tried solving this with existing skills, agents, or hooks? What didn't work?

## Scope check

Before submitting, please confirm:

- [ ] This is generic and useful to most users (not specific to my project)
- [ ] This doesn't conflict with the core philosophy in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] I've checked that this isn't already in the existing 17 skills or 9 agents
- [ ] I'm willing to test the change on a real scenario before opening a PR

## Additional context

Any links, references, related issues, or examples from other tools.
